mapper.insert:
SELECT EXAM.SEQ_EXAM_POLICY_DETAIL.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO EXAM_POLICY_DETAIL( ID, EXAM_POLICY_ID, TYPE, LEV, QUESTION_COUNT, PER_SCORE, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, CREATED_BY, ENABLED_FLAG )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{examPolicyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lev,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{questionCount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{perScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE EXAM_POLICY_DETAIL SET ID=#id:NUMERIC#, EXAM_POLICY_ID=#examPolicyId:NUMERIC#, TYPE=#type:VARCHAR#, LEV=#lev:VARCHAR#, PER_SCORE=#perScore:NUMERIC#, LAST_UPDATED_BY=#lastUpdatedBy:NUMERIC#, CREATED_BY=#createdBy:NUMERIC# WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE EXAM_POLICY_DETAIL SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE EXAM_POLICY_DETAIL SET ENABLED_FLAG=0 WHERE EXAM_POLICY_ID=#{policyId}
